title: JustAnnouncements
body:
JustAnnouncements is a simple yet powerful plugin designed for Minecraft servers running on Bukkit, Spigot, or Paper platforms. It provides a straightforward way to broadcast announcements to all players on the server. The plugin includes a customizable prefix that can be easily modified in the configuration file to fit your server's branding or style. This feature allows server administrators to personalize the look and feel of their announcements.

You can use the **/announce** command to send messages to all connected players. This command is intuitive and easy to use, making it accessible to both new and experienced server administrators. The plugin is lightweight and efficient, ensuring minimal impact on server performance.
